findings.evidence: `AmbientIsotopyClass.lean:7` imports `...AmbientIsotopyProd`; lines 64-131 use only `AmbientIsotopic.setoid`/`setoid_r_iff`, while lines 150-178 are the only declarations using `AmbientIsotopic.prodMap_setoid` from `AmbientIsotopyProd.lean:78`.
findings.fix: Make the core class file import `TauCeti.Geometry.Manifold.SmoothEmbedding.AmbientIsotopy`; move `AmbientIsotopyClass.prodMap` and `prodMap_mk_mk` to a product-specific file importing both the core class file and `AmbientIsotopyProd`.
findings.issue: `AmbientIsotopyClass`, `mk`, `mk_eq_mk_iff`, `lift`, and `map` are broadly useful quotient API depending only on `AmbientIsotopic.setoid`, but the file imports `AmbientIsotopyProd` solely for the later `prodMap` operation.

summary: The quotient core is placed after and depends on the product-closure module even though it only needs the ambient-isotopy setoid. Split the core class API from the product operation so downstream users can import ambient-isotopy classes without pulling in product theory.
